PROP-baseauction-inv-045.text: transmit must reject stale reports (observationsTimestamp < block.timestamp - stalenessThreshold).
PROP-baseauction-inv-045.assertion: forall transmit(report): obsTimestamp < now - staleness => revert StaleFeedData()

locations.note: Staleness check on observationsTimestamp against block.timestamp - stalenessThreshold enforced in transmit
